commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4958044d010f43fee4ee8796308f8349e68c504b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `data-run-history` marker to the cron Run history card and schedules a smooth scroll to it after a job History button click.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not live-reproduced in this review: current main renders Run history below the jobs list and the History click only loads runs. A live `/cron` page with enough jobs below the fold would be the high-confidence browser reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed because real browser proof must come from a contributor or maintainer environment, and the remaining code fix is a small review correction.

target.title: fix: scroll Run history card into view on History button click (#59902)
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
